trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: add an admin role-assignment endpoint to manage user_roles (including validated program/cohort teacher scopes) with audit events, then add deterministic integration coverage.
scope: Implement `/api/admin/role-assignments` (admin-only) to list/create/remove role assignments in `user_roles` while validating role IDs and program/cohort teacher scope IDs, writing audit events for create/duplicate/remove, then add integration tests proving 401/403/400/404/200 behavior and audit metadata.
changes: Added `/api/admin/role-assignments` (admin-only) to list/create/remove `user_roles` entries, including role/scope validation and program/cohort existence checks for scoped `program_teacher` roles.
Wrote audit events for role-assignment creates, duplicates, and removals with stable metadata fields (userId, roleId, scopeType, scopeId).
Added deterministic integration coverage proving authorization, validation, and audit behavior for the new endpoint.
known_limits: Role assignment writes currently require the target user to be `active`, matching other admin write endpoints; pre-provisioning roles for disabled/pending users is follow-on if needed.
This endpoint manages `user_roles` only; higher-level admin UX for user import/provisioning remains separate work.
next_actions: Wire the admin provisioning UI (or account smoke admin panel) to call `/api/admin/role-assignments` for program-teacher scope management and misc-admin narrowing.
Add complementary admin endpoints for user provisioning/import and group membership changes, keeping audits and deterministic tests.
